overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a sunlit Mediterranean-style village with stone architecture and lush gardens. The character traverses cliffside terraces, covered stone passages, and open courtyards before entering a candlelit building and returning to the gardens.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated terrace path with panoramic views of the lake valley below

entered.detail: expansive blue lake surrounded by rolling hills and mountains in the distance
Mediterranean-style stone building with terracotta roof tiles
tall narrow evergreen tree lining the path
red clay roof tiles of adjacent building
low stone wall bordering the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit cliffside terrace with panoramic views of a distant lake valley. The character walks along a cobblestone path bordered by a stone railing, passing cypress trees and Mediterranean-style villas with terracotta roofs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone passage with ivy-covered walls

events.description: enters covered stone archway passage from open terrace

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow shaded passage with vegetation growing overhead and along walls

notable_agents.action: person sitting on wooden bench in the shaded passage

entered.detail: arched stone tunnel entrance covered in climbing ivy
stone walls completely covered in green ivy and vines
simple wooden bench where an NPC is seated
ornate dark metal door set in the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, shaded stone passage covered in dense ivy and vegetation. An NPC sits on a wooden bench to the left as the camera moves through the tunnel-like archway with dappled sunlight filtering through leaves above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open garden courtyard with central fountain

events.description: exits covered passage into bright sunlit garden courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through open courtyard with stone paving, passing fountain and garden features

entered.detail: decorative stone fountain basin in the garden
carved stone balustrade along the path edge
large ornate metal gate at the far end of the courtyard
mature olive tree with gnarled trunk and silvery leaves

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shaded passage, the scene opens into a bright sunlit garden courtyard with a central stone fountain. The character walks along cobblestone paths lined with ornate railings and olive trees, heading toward a large metal gate visible in the distance.

events.description: slows and approaches the stone building entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance of a small stone chapel where an elderly NPC sits on a bench nearby

notable_agents.action: elderly person sitting on wooden bench near the chapel doorway

entered.detail: small stone chapel building with arched doorway and bell cote
ornate carved stone relief on wall beside door
terracotta pots with red flowers flanking the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a small stone chapel entrance flanked by potted flowers. An elderly NPC sits on a wooden bench to the right of the doorway as the character slows and prepares to enter the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit interior chapel room with candles

events.description: enters dimly lit interior illuminated by candlelight
turns around and walks back toward the exit doorway

agents.ego_description: entering the candlelit interior, looking around the stone room, then turning to exit

notable_agents.action: person standing near the back wall inside the chapel

entered.detail: wooden altar table with candles and cloth in center of room
stone tomb or sarcophagus along the right wall
lit candles providing warm flickering illumination
open doorway showing bright exterior garden

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit stone interior illuminated by candles on a central wooden table. A stone sarcophagus rests against the wall while an NPC stands in the shadows. After a brief look around, the character turns and walks back toward the bright doorway leading outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden path leading to metal gate

events.description: exits building back to bright sunlit garden
approaches large metal gate at end of path

agents.ego_description: walking along garden path toward a large metal gate where a woman stands nearby

notable_agents.action: woman in dress standing near the metal gate ahead

entered.detail: stone pillars supporting the gate structure

segments.scene_description: Exiting the chapel, the character returns to the bright sunlit garden and continues along the cobblestone path. The metal gate seen earlier now approaches as the camera moves forward, with a woman standing nearby and stone pillars marking the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive, sunlit cliffside terrace into the intimate confines of a village chapel. It begins along a cobblestone path bordered by a stone railing, passing cypress trees and terracotta-roofed villas with panoramic views of a distant lake valley. As the character moves forward, the open vista gives way to a narrow, shaded stone passage where dappled sunlight filters through dense ivy and vegetation. The scene then opens into a bright garden courtyard centered around a stone fountain, with the camera gliding past olive trees and ornate railings toward a distant metal gate. Finally, the path leads to a small stone chapel entrance flanked by potted flowers, slowing as it approaches an elderly NPC seated beside the doorway.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a somber, candlelit interior back into the brilliance of a sun-drenched garden. It begins inside a dimly lit stone room where candles flicker on a central wooden table near a stone sarcophagus and a shadowed figure. As the character turns away from the interior, the camera follows them toward the bright light of the doorway, shifting the atmosphere from gloom to vivid clarity. The scene then opens back into the lush outdoor environment, gliding along a cobblestone path under the bright sun. Finally, the movement continues forward toward a metal gate and stone pillars where a woman stands waiting.
